prompt: Create a vertical cinematic photorealistic luxury product advertisement: a transparent glass capsule lying horizontally on a rain-soaked city street at night, with a miniature black Bentley SUV displayed inside the clear left half. The capsule has exactly 2 main sections: a clear rounded glass dome on the left covered with water droplets, and a glossy metallic right half with an iridescent purple-magenta-blue gradient. On the right half, place a gold winged Bentley-style emblem with a circular “B” above the large white word BENTLEY. The road surface is black, wet, and reflective, showing a mirrored reflection of the capsule, the car, the emblem, and the brand text below; include scattered raindrops and small puddles in the foreground. Use dramatic shallow depth of field with a blurred nighttime urban background, warm streetlight bokeh on the left, cool blue and purple neon bokeh on the right, misty rain atmosphere, high contrast, premium automotive advertising lighting, hyper-detailed glass refraction, crisp water droplets, glossy reflections, and cinematic realism. Portrait orientation, close low-angle macro product shot, no people, no extra objects, no watermark.
